scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\pip install --upgrade pip && .venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.format: npm run format:backend && npm run format:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.clean: powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force backend\.venv -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force frontend\node_modules -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
